title: mentha limosa
intro: Mentha limosa, also known as Wild Marjoram or Sweet Marjoram, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha limosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Mentha limosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, tinctures, and infused vinegars, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
